name: fleet operations directors managing 5-15 vehicles tool
description: For fleet operations directors managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient tracking of fuel consumption causes increased operational costs. We automate weekly fuel consumption reports instead of manual tracking and reporting of fuel consumption.
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of fuel consumption leading to increased operational costs

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient tracking of fuel consumption leading to increased operational costs
